item.title: I'm Just a Bill: National Endowment for Arts + Humanities Reauthorization
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — NEA + NEH Reauthorization

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

National Endowment for the Arts + National Endowment for the Humanities reauthorization in the 119th Congress.

What does it actually do?

  • Reauthorizes NEA + NEH grant programs
  • State-arts-agency partnership funding
  • Tribal Arts and Humanities funding
  • Rural arts access provisions
  • Arts-education provisions composing with Department of Education

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #13 JukeBox (cooperative-class music sector composing with public-arts funding) and #14 Didasko (arts-education access composing with cooperative-education).
